description: 資料庫連接字串與內部服務 URI (含密碼) — Hard Positive
generation_guidelines: Generate database connection strings and internal service URIs that contain credentials. Cover: PostgreSQL (postgres://user:pass@host/db), MySQL, MongoDB (mongodb+srv://), Redis (redis://:password@), Elasticsearch, RabbitMQ, and generic JDBC strings. Include internal hosts (localhost, 10.x, 172.x, db.internal). Paths: root.config.database, root.services.redis, root.app.db.production.

examples.text: Path: root.config.database | Key: connection_string | Struct: Leaf | Val: "postgres://admin:S3cur3P@ss!@db.internal:5432/production"
Path: root.app.redis | Key: uri | Struct: Leaf | Val: "redis://:p@ssw0rd!@10.0.1.50:6379/0"
